summary: Crystal‑clear audience recording of the legendary Greek Theatre ‘83 show, highlighted by soaring China Cat > I Know You Rider jams and massive Phil Lesh bombs.
review: The tape captures an electrifying night at the Greek Theater with a kick‑ass opener, marathon second‑set improvisations that often stretch beyond ten minutes, and a standout China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider sequence that fans rave about. The audience source is exceptionally clean and vivid, preserving crowd reactions and the infamous Phil “bombs” while delivering total clarity across the band.

ai_rating.rationale: All but one reviewer gave five stars, praising both performance and audio fidelity; the lone three‑star note mentions only a minor personal gripe about song selection.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clean sounding AUD with total clarity, good range, captures crowd reaction and massive Phil Lesh bass “bombs”; no notable drop‑outs or muddiness reported.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: High energy throughout, a powerful opener, and a second set filled with extended jams (10+ minutes) that keep the momentum flowing; fans love the lack of an encore, ending on a high note.

band_member_comments.Phil: Massive Phil bombs in China Cat Sunflower noted by reviewers.
band_member_comments.Bob: Some reviewers mention “Bob’s song selection” but no specific performance comment.
